evals.prompt: Use pdd-zero for a rough idea: a Mac menu bar app that tracks my mouse gestures and app usage habits. Do not write code yet.
evals.expected_output: Produces a Project Launch Packet with pressure test, PRD, Decision Ledger, product/interface direction, implementation slices, verification plan, architecture guardrails, version plan, and immediate next actions. It calls out local data/privacy and release blockers, and does not implement code.

evals.prompt: 从0到1做一个 iOS 小众工具，帮用户管理冰箱食材过期。先走完整新项目流程，然后告诉我 Slice 1 怎么做。
evals.expected_output: Handles the Chinese new-project trigger, narrows the MVP, produces a launch packet with a Decision Ledger, and ends with concrete Slice 1 acceptance criteria without depending on external skills.

evals.prompt: I want to build an AI SaaS where users upload documents and receive a personal profile with recommendations. Help me lock product logic, privacy boundaries, and version direction before coding.
evals.expected_output: Emphasizes pressure testing, consent, upload/privacy boundaries, blocked decisions, release blockers, architecture guardrails, and version progression before implementation.
